generic_rules: Focus repairs on resolving AGREE syntax errors and type mismatches.
Prioritize fixing unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations.
Use only visible AADL features or locally declared helpers in AGREE expressions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts reside within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Ensure correct data types (int, real, bool) are used in AGREE declarations.
Use `eq` helpers for complex expressions to improve readability and maintainability.
anti_patterns: Do not introduce unqualified identifiers or types not present in the AADL model.
Avoid adding architecture to fix AGREE errors; focus on correcting the contract itself.
Do not attempt to place guarantees within implementation annexes.
